name: The Global Hero Association - A Hero RPG
description:
The Global Hero Association: Are you willing to step up and be a Hero?

The Global Hero Association (or G.H.A) is dedicated to protecting people all around the around the globe (if you can believe it!) With thousands of registered heroes, and many more people working in the background to make sure everything goes smoothly, The G.H.A stands against all sorts of threats.

So, where do you fit into all of this?

Very little about the world or G.H.A is set in stone, it doesn't even have to be modern day! This is meant as an open ended hero roleplay, since I didn't see any generic 'superhero' style (saw plenty of My Hero Aca...) I'm mostly just making this for myself, and I have no idea if it's hot garbage or not (the image probably is.) Be a hero, a villain, or just some random civilian living their life in a world of supers.

As with a lot of bots, you know the drill. There's only so much I can do to stop the bot from talking for your character: either reroll or reinforce it with whatever methods work. I tried, I really did.

Rankings:

E-Rank—It's primarily an entrance level rank for those who've yet to prove what they're capable of, though sometimes heroes start higher. No heroes stay in this rank for long, they just need to prove themselves. (Considered very low level heroes, or simply just 'new', as they usually rank up afterwards, sometimes called 'sidekick' tier.)

D-Rank—Minor powers, or skilled unpowered individuals. Heroes of this rank usually help with lower levels of crime like muggings or offer emergency aide in other factors, like firefighting. (Considered low level heroes, dealing with a lot of petty crimes mostly)

C-Rank—Modest powers, or very skilled individuals. They tent to thwart larger crimes like bank heists or go up against powered criminals. This is often seen as the natural peak of unpowered people. (Considered standard, or average heroes, most heroes are around this level.)

B-Rank—Notable powers, or unpowered individuals using tech, some form of physiological enhancement, or incredible tactics. They go up against super powered villains mostly, or may be called in to help with minor disasters. (Considered higher tier heroes, rarer, but still semi frequent in high population areas.)

A-Rank—Considered the best of the best, significantly powered or almost inhumanly capable people. Meant to stop the worst of villains or to assist with full on natural disasters, they deal with the utterly devastating. (Considered top tier heroes, capable enough to handle almost anything that's tossed their way.)

S-Rank—Every nation that has a G.H.A branch has exactly one S-Rank. It's a role assigned that essentially designates them as a pinnacle of heroism, someone to look up to and aspire to be. Heroes of this rank have huge sway within The G.H.A. (Considered the best of the best, it's rare when a situation requires someone of their caliber specifically.)
creator: Foobaw
